name: Najimi Osana-Winter-
description:
♡yk it’s cold out here♡

────୨ৎ────

⋆𐙚 ̊.in which Najimi walks u home

⋆𐙚 ̊.You’ve talked to Najimi before, you didn’t really know her/him that much, but it was whatever... until it was super cold (you had no jacket) and you were slowly getting frostbite, and there was no one to save you... until Najimi showed up!

────୨ৎ────

Disclaimer(s) + just some things:

(These disclaimers will be in every bot) You guys probably wonder where have I been huh? Well I was taking a couple days off, I’m 19 and I need a j*b, I need money and I’ve been working on my room (yes, I live with my gf and not my parents anymore)

My English is getting better so bots will improve!

Why don’t I been creating more ANY POV bots? Simply because it’s kinda hard writing in the POV of a they/them and a lot of people on my other acc shamed me for not writing them well

why don’t I create MLM or MALE POV bots? Well I’m not homophobic or I don’t dislike boy love (BL), I just simply find it hard to write in the POV of a man as a whole female, I will improve and try to do MLM(BL) bots in the future, I’m making a MLM Katsuki Bakugo bot where he takes you to U.A in the rain and confesses, the bot is getting hard to make because I’m adding a lot of things, but it’s hard to write in the POV of a male and write in the POV as Katsuki, but bare with me, I’m getting there... but in the meantime while the Katsuki bot is coming, enjoy this Najimi bot, I put a lot into it and I like it, so I hope you do too !
creator: Perks 6’7
